data.content: Implemented style-only refactors across the assigned dialog and settings components. Extracted helper components/hooks to clear max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len in the target files, and added settings-agents-section-controls.tsx for the split agents UI. Validation: targeted explicit-rule ESLint on all assigned files passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed; bun run build passed. Full bun run lint exits 0 but still reports unrelated repo-wide no-unused-vars warnings outside this beat's scope.
